subcodes.first_line: O thou who art near to the Threshold of the Divine Unity! The effects of thy musk-scented pen have made sweet the taste of the eager ones. The meanings were spiritual [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقرب درگاه احدیت اثر کلک مشکین مذاق مشتاقان را شکرین نمود معانی روحانی بود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement
